meta.title: Vityilló Guest House – Szomód
meta.description: Luxury guest house in the heart of the Gerecse hills, Szomód. Private forest, sauna, pool.

hero.title: Vityilló Guest House
hero.subtitle: Private forest, sauna, pool — where luxury meets the wilderness

about.label: Our Story
about.title: Where the forest meets comfort
about.p1: Vityilló Guest House nestles in the picturesque village of Szomód, at the foot of the Gerecse hills — where the silence of nature and modern luxury coexist in perfect harmony. Surrounded by a private forest, serene clearings and fresh air embrace this extraordinary retreat.
about.p2: Whether you seek a romantic escape for two or an exceptional hideaway for a small group, Vityilló offers a unique experience: private sauna, outdoor pool, kettle grill and panoramic views across the Gerecse hills.

amenities.label: Amenities
amenities.title: Everything you need
amenities.subtitle: Thoughtfully crafted for the perfect retreat

ac.name: Air Conditioning
ac.desc: Modern split AC in every room

rooms.label: Our Rooms
rooms.title: Choose Your Room
rooms.subtitle: Comfort and elegance on every level

room1.name: Upper Floor
room1.desc: Spacious master bedroom with a double bed, elegant living area and full bathroom with shower cabin. Direct forest panorama views.

room2.name: Lower Floor
room2.desc: Three-bed room with its own bathroom and shower cabin. Garden access directly from the room.
